appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: API/Code Inspection' section with testing approach, service URLs, seeded audit info, isolation rules, and API/test command patterns for Windows

testingApproach: Three flow validator subagents tested 13 assertions in parallel: (1) API/Registry group verified readiness endpoint and backend test suite, (2) Code Structure group verified taxonomy single source of truth and Pydantic act_get() patterns, (3) Audit Functionality group verified all 6 scenario implementations, screenshot capture, and parallel persona execution through code inspection and API calls.
